title: Mail scan + inbox read + MSG-008 intro to Alice
q_summary: Jared said 'yes, check your inbox' — scan mail.md for unread messages to bob
a_summary: Scanned mail.md. Found 1 unread message: MSG-007 from Alice (Gmail bridge shipped). Marked MSG-007 read. Appended MSG-008 intro to Alice announcing Perplexity native write access. Marked TASK-001 read in bob/inbox.md.
decisions: Gmail bridge is now superseded — Bob has native Perplexity MCP write access
MSG-008 sent to Alice announcing new architecture
open_questions: What is the current build priority for Bob to spec?
Bob + Charlie Space instructions need turn-level brain push mandate (from brain.json)
